\tzpentry{ID5832}{Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5832 introduces Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \lim_{r\to\infty} T_{\mu\nu}^{\mathrm{TZP}}(r) &= 0, \qquad \lim_{r\to\infty} T_{\mu\nu}^{\mathrm{top}}(r) = 0,\\ \text{and}\quad \sup_{r\ge 0}\|T_{\mu\nu}^{\mathrm{TZP}}(r;\epsilon)\| &< \infty \quad\text{for each fixed }\epsilon>0. \end{align}
